subcodes.first_line: When any soul turneth with utter humility and submissiveness unto the omnipotent Lord, and becometh abashed and ashamed of its deficiencies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر نفسی چون بکمال خضوع و خشوع به ربّ قدير توجّه نمايد و از قصور خويش خجل و شرمسار
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action
